title: UI polish (errors, loading, collapsible sidebar)
steps: Install sonner toast library. Add Toaster provider.
Try/catch on all fetches. Toast on errors. Loading spinner while AI responds. Connection-lost banner. 401 → redirect to login.
Collapsible sidebar: hamburger menu, overlay with transition, click-outside-to-close.
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar collapses to hamburger, opens as overlay
